01001.name: Roland Banks
01001.text:
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each clue on your location.

01006.name: Roland's .38 Special
01006.text: Roland Banks deck only. Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack (if there are 1 or more clues on your location, you get +3 [combat], instead). This attack deals +1 damage.

01007.name: Cover Up
01007.text: Revelation - Put Cover Up into play in your threat area, with 3 clues on it. [reaction] When you would discover 1 or more clues at your location: Discard that many clues from Cover Up instead. Forced - When the game ends, if there are any clues on Cover Up: You suffer 1 mental trauma.

01017.name: Physical Training
01017.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.

01019.name: First Aid
01019.text:
Uses (3 supplies). If First Aid has no supplies, discard it.
[action] Spend 1 supply: Heal 1 damage or horror from an investigator at your location.

01020.name: Machete
01020.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. If the attacked enemy is the only enemy engaged with you, this attack deals +1 damage.

01021.name: Guard Dog
01021.text: [reaction] When an enemy attack deals damage to Guard Dog: Deal 1 damage to the attacking enemy.

01022.name: Evidence!
01022.text:
Fast. Play after you defeat an enemy.
Discover 1 clue at your location.

01023.name: Dodge
01023.text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.
Cancel that attack.

01024.name: Dynamite Blast
01024.text: Choose either your location or a connecting location. Deal 3 damage to each enemy and to each investigator at the chosen location.

01038.name: Barricade
01038.text: Attach to your location. Non-[[Elite]] enemies cannot move into attached location. Forced - When an investigator leaves attached location: Discard Barricade.

01039.name: Deduction
01039.text: If this skill test is successful while investigating a location, discover 1 additional clue at that location.

01086.name: Knife
01086.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Knife: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

01087.name: Flashlight
01087.text: Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Investigate. Your location gets -2 shroud for this investigation.

01089.name: Guts
01089.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01090.name: Perception
01090.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01104.name: The Gathering
01104.text:
Easy / Standard
[skull] -X. X is the number of [[Ghoul]] enemies at your location.
[cultist] -1. If you fail, take 1 horror.
[tablet] -2. If there is a [[Ghoul]] enemy at your location, take 1 damage.

01107.name: They're Getting Out!
01107.text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Each unengaged [[Ghoul]] enemy moves 1 location towards the Parlor. Forced - At the end of the round: Place 1 doom on this agenda for each [[Ghoul]] enemy in the Hallway or Parlor.

01109.name: The Barrier
01109.text: Objective - When the round ends, investigators in the hallway may, as a group, spend the requisite number of clues to advance.

01110.name: What Have You Done?
01110.text: Objective - If the Ghoul Priest is Defeated, advance.

01113.name: Attic
01113.text: Forced - After you enter the Attic: Take 1 horror.

01115.name: Parlor
01115.text: [action] Resign. "This is too much for me!" You run out the front door, fleeing in panic. While Lita Chantler is not controlled by a player, she gains: "[action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (4). If you succeed, take control of Lita Chantler."

01117.name: Lita Chantler
01117.text:
While you control Lita Chantler, she gains:
"Each investigator at your location gets +1 [combat].
[reaction] When an investigator at your location successfully attacks a [[Monster]] enemy: That investigator deals +1 damage."

01163.name: Rotting Remains
01163.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror.

01166.name: Ancient Evils
01166.text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

01168.name: Obscuring Fog
01168.text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Attached location gets +2 shroud. Forced - After attached location is successfully investigated: Discard Obscuring Fog.

01174.name: Locked Door
01174.text: Revelation - Attach to the location in play with the most clues, and without a Locked Door attached. The attached location cannot be investigated. [action]: Test [combat] (4) to break down the door or [agility] (4) to pick the lock. If you succeed, discard Locked Door.

50012.name: Mysterious Gateway
50012.text: Objective - Only investigators in the Guest Hall may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

50013.name: Study
50013.text:
[action] [action]: Draw 3 cards. Only the lead investigator can activate this ability.
Forced - When an enemy attempts to spawn at a location that is not in play: Put that location into play and spawn that enemy there.

50014.name: Guest Hall
50014.text: Investigators in this location cannot take draw actions.

50015.name: Bedroom
50015.text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating the Bedroom: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

50016.name: Bathroom
50016.text: Forced - After you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [auto_fail] symbol while investigating the Bathroom: Lose all remaining actions and end your turn.

50017.name: Hallway
50017.text: Forced - After you reveal this location: Put the set-aside Attic, Cellar, and Parlor locations into play.

50020.name: Cellar
50020.text: Forced - After you reveal the Cellar: Put the set-aside Deep Below Your House location into play.

50021.name: Ghoul Pits
50021.text: Forced - After you reveal Ghoul Pits: Test [agility] (3). For each point you fail by, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a copy of Swarm of Rats and draw it. Shuffle the encounter deck.

50038.name: Grave-Eater
50038.text: Forced - After Grave-Eater attacks you: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

50039.name: Acolyte of Umôrdhoth
50039.text:
Prey - Fewest cards in hand.
While engaged with an investigator with no cards in his or her hand, Acolyte of Umôrdhoth cannot be evaded.

50040.name: Chill from Below
50040.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, you must discard 1 card at random from your hand. For each card you cannot discard, take 1 damage.
